items.question: What is Our Dream AI?
items.answer: Our Dream AI (ourdream.ai) is an AI roleplay platform where imagination meets conversation. We are a no limits platform where you can roleplay any fantasy you like. Create customizable AI companions, enjoy smooth conversations, generate images and videos, and make voice calls.

items.question: How do you create an AI girlfriend on OurDream?
items.answer: The OurDream AI girlfriend creator lets you customize appearance and personality. Choose between realistic or anime art styles and adjust features like face, body type, hair, clothing, and accessories. For personality, you set traits, interests, communication styles, and relationship dynamics. The AI learns from your chats to get better over time.

items.question: What is OurDream.ai's pricing?
items.answer: OurDream.ai costs $9.99/month with a yearly plan (billed upfront as $119.88) or $19.99/month for a monthly plan. Both include unlimited messages, image and video generation, and 1000 dreamcoins each month. The yearly plan also includes a bonus 1000 dreamcoins when you first subscribe.

items.question: Is OurDream AI legit and safe to use?
items.answer: Yes, OurDream is a trusted AI roleplay platform used by millions daily. We focus on providing a safe, private, and high-quality experience. Our active Discord channel has over 2000 daily members. We have over 10 million dreamers and 7 million pieces of user-generated characters.

items.question: Are my AI roleplay chats private?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your chats are safe with end-to-end encryption. This keeps your messages secure from the moment they leave your device. No one can read them, not even us. We prioritize privacy at OurDream.

items.question: Why is OurDream more expensive than others?
items.answer: At face value we are more expensive, but if you compare us against other AI roleplay platforms, we're cheaper. On most other platforms, you will spend $20-40+ per month on additional tokens. At OurDream AI, 1,000 dreamcoins is included in the subscription which covers all your needs including videos.
